verse_text: 'In that day, he who is on the housetop, and his goods are in the house, let him not come down to take them away. And likewise the one who is in the field, let him not turn back.

links.context: In [[LUK.17:28]]-33, the Lord commanded us to remember Lot's wife, for she lost her life because she turned back in disobedience to the Lord.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
